title: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Wolfgang Krauser

synonyms: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Wolfgang Krauser - Long Animation Trailer
alternative_titles.en: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Wolfgang Krauser Trailer
alternative_titles.ja: 餓狼伝説 CotW｜ヴォルフガング・クラウザー｜ロングアニメーショントレーラー

synopsis:
Wolfgang Krauser special anime short by Masami Oobari.

The mighty Wolfgang Krauser, once feared as the Emperor of Darkness, rises from the ashes and casts a sinister shadow across South Town in his quest for vengeance. Will the city's resilient wolves—Terry Bogard, Andy Bogard, and Joe Higashi—be able to thwart his attempted takeover? Strap in for the intense action that ensues as the streets play host to a brutal battle between good and evil—all in the dynamic visual style that world-renowned animator Masami Obari does best.

(Source: YouTube)
